patch.value: Missing-webhook failure returns error object and exits 0 (wrong exit code)

Symptom: pm standup with no webhook and no --dry-run exited 0. Repro: unset PM_SLACK_WEBHOOK; pm standup; echo $?. Observed: exit 0 with {error:'missing_webhook'}. Expected: non-zero exit. Root cause: handler did 'return {error,...}' which pm treats as success. Fix: throw new Error(...) instead. Also added a 10s request timeout to postToSlack (was missing, unlike pm-slack) to avoid hangs. Proven live: missing webhook now exits 1; real unreachable webhook also exits 1; dry-run still exits 0.
Fixed: throw instead of return error -> non-zero exit; added 10s timeout. Verified exit=1 live.
